title: N'do Maetrecis
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=N'do Maetrecis |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|How's our latest poster boy for the horrors of war doing?|Jos Vondar, asking Zan Yant about N'do Maetrecis's status|}} '''N'do Maetrecis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Major/Legends|major]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], after being injured in a [[Battle of Drongar|battle]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Drongar]], he underwent a [[Heart/Legends|heart]] transplant due to a shrapnel injury. Afterward, Maetrecis then contracted a [[Disease/Legends|disease]] from Drongar's [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]], though [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Zan Yant]] managed to successfully treat the persistent ailment using an illegal healing substance—the [[Plant/Legends|plant]] [[Bota/Legends|bota]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|All right. What's going on here?''"
"''Going on? What are you talking about?''"
"''I'm talking about a patient who comes out of a life-threatening secondary infection so fast he leaves ion burns on his chart. I’m also talking about treatment with unmarked skinpoppers.''"
"''You didn't.''"
"''I did.|Jos Vondar and Zan Yant, as the former confronted the latter about his treatment of N'do Maetrecis|}} The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] N'do Maetrecis was active during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Great Peace of the Republic|reign]]. He served as a [[Major/Legends|major]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. [[File:Zan_Yant.jpg|thumb|right|260px|Zan Yant (pictured) saved N'do Maetrecis's life by treating him with bota, despite the plant being illegal to administer.]] In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of ''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' to [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]. Maetrecis was stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]],{{CSWECite|II|274|Maetrecis, N'do}} fighting in a [[Battle of Drongar|battle]] where he was wounded by shrapnel. [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|Republic Mobile Surgical Unit]] [[Doctor/Legends|surgeons]] succeeded in conducting a [[Heart/Legends|heart]] transplant on him, though the procedure took several [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]]. Shortly afterward, Maetrecis then contracted one of many unknown [[Disease/Legends|diseases]] found in Drongar's [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]]. As his skin turned pale and anhidrotic, doctors struggled to discover the root cause of his ailment and fretted as [[antibiotic]] medicine failed to combat his infection. Medical personnel attempted several techniques—such as [[macromolecular regeneration]], [[nanocell implant]]s, and [[maser cauterization]]—to no success. As Maetrecis lay ill, a member of [[The Silent]] kept a vigil from outside the major's sterile isolation chamber—holding a vow of silence—which was believed by some individuals to passively assist healing. In response, Doctor [[Zan Yant]] used processed [[Bota/Legends|bota]]—a [[Plant/Legends|plant]] found on Drongar with substantial medicinal qualities—to save Maetrecis's life, prompting him to begin making a fast recovery. However, as using bota was illegal by Republic law, Yant kept the medicine in unmarked containers while administering it. Surgeon [[Jos Vondar]] and Yant later discussed Maetrecis' condition while checking over the major's vital signs, noticing that his condition had improved significantly since their last check in. When the major briefly woke up, Vondar reassured him everything was fine. When the surgeons left the room, Vondar berated the other doctor for using bota on the major, though Yant defended his actions, insisting he wanted to save lives. ==Behind the scenes== N'do Maetrecis first appeared in the [[2004]] novel ''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'', which was written by by [[Michael Reaves]] and [[Steve Perry]] as the first installment of the [[MedStar Duology]]. ==Appearances== *''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' {{1st|[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]]}} *[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons (abridged audiobook)|''MedStar I: Battle Surgeons'' abridged audiobook]] ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=N'do Maetrecis }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Maetrecis, N'do}} [[Category:Grand Army of the Republic officers]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Majors]] [[Category:Males]]
